name: AdonisJS (Full-Stack Node.js Framework)

auth.notes: Full-stack framework with built-in auth package

performance.notes: Similar performance to NestJS; full-featured framework overhead

agent_readiness.notes: Laravel-inspired full-stack Node.js framework. MVC architecture. Router, controllers, models (Lucid ORM on top of Knex), views (Edge templates or Inertia.js). Built-in: auth (@adonisjs/auth), validation (VineJS), mail, testing. TypeScript-first. CLI (node ace). Module-based DI container. v6 rewrites as pure ESM. Smaller community than NestJS. Better DX than NestJS for solo/small teams. Laravel devs feel at home.

gotchas: Lucid ORM less mature than TypeORM/Prisma
v6 pure ESM migration breaks older packages
best_when: Node.js full-stack MVC apps (Laravel devs switching to Node)
Solo/small team projects wanting conventions over configuration
Projects wanting batteries-included (auth, mail, validation) without NestJS complexity
avoid_when: Large teams needing big ecosystem and community
REST-only APIs without full-stack needs (Fastify lighter)
summary: AdonisJS is a Laravel-inspired full-stack Node.js framework. TypeScript-first MVC with router, Lucid ORM, Edge templates, built-in auth/mail/validation (VineJS). CLI (node ace). v6 pure ESM. Better DX than NestJS for small teams; less ecosystem. Inertia.js integration for React/Vue SSR. Laravel developers transitioning to Node.js will feel at home. NestJS for enterprise; Fastify for APIs only.
